title: Foundry App Build Result
description: Schema for structured result summary after building a Falcon Foundry app

app_name.description: Name of the Foundry app created

deployment_id.description: Deployment ID returned by foundry apps deploy, or NONE if deploy failed

spec_source.description: Whether the OpenAPI spec was downloaded from vendor or written manually

capabilities.description: List of capabilities created (API integration, workflow, UI extension, etc.)

errors.description: Any errors encountered during the build, or NONE
